workbench.dashboard_subtitle: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your projects today.

about.title: About GoWind CMS
about.subtitle: Powerful Multi-Tenant Headless CMS
about.description: GoWind CMS is a next-generation Headless CMS designed for modern enterprises, providing flexible and scalable content management solutions.
about.about_us_desc_1: GoWind CMS is a next-generation Headless CMS designed for modern enterprises, dedicated to providing flexible and scalable content management solutions.
about.about_us_desc_2: We deeply understand enterprise content management needs and help organizations easily manage and publish content through multi-tenant architecture, enterprise-grade security, and high-performance APIs.
about.about_us_desc_3: Whether you are a small team or a large enterprise, GoWind CMS provides a professional content management experience.
about.features_desc: GoWind CMS provides enterprise-grade content management features to meet all your needs
about.feature_content_desc: Support for multiple content types and custom fields to meet complex content management requirements
about.feature_multi_tenant_desc: Complete tenant isolation and resource sharing, supporting management of multiple organizations on a single platform
about.feature_security_desc: Role-based access control, data encryption, and audit logs ensure data security
about.feature_api_desc: RESTful API support for seamless integration with third-party services and applications
about.feature_collaboration_desc: Team members can edit and comment in real-time, improving work efficiency
about.feature_analytics_desc: Detailed content performance analytics and user behavior data to help optimize your content
about.team_desc: An outstanding team of experienced engineers and product specialists
about.values_desc: These values guide our decisions and actions, helping us create maximum value for our customers
about.value_innovation_desc: We continuously innovate and explore the latest technologies and methodologies to provide cutting-edge solutions
about.value_reliability_desc: We are committed to providing stable and reliable services to ensure your business runs continuously
about.value_customer_desc: Your success is our success. We are fully committed to supporting your business goals
about.cta_desc: Explore all features of GoWind CMS now, or contact our team for professional advice
